positive: Minimalist stylized depiction of a cosmic mountain range meeting a stylized crescent moon and scattered geometric constellations. The composition must feature bold, clean silhouettes with strong, defined edges, suitable for textile printing. Use a high-contrast limited color palette of deep midnight blue, celestial gold, and soft teal. The style should evoke Art Nouveau astronomy mixed with modern vector graphic simplicity. Composition: Centralized and symmetrical. Lighting: Dramatic, emanating from the central celestial elements. Focus on negative space and clean lines. Perfect for a centered apparel print.
